records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... There is nothing here. Girls, did you find anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... There is nothing here. Girls, did you find anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... There is nothing here. Girls, did you find anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nope. My detection drone's got nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nope. My detection drone's got nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nope. My detection drone's got nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's try looking a little harder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's try looking a little harder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's try looking a little harder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we complete the quest, Naielle will surely help us find the best hero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we complete the quest, Naielle will surely help us find the best hero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we complete the quest, Naielle will surely help us find the best hero.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen. It says a monster is protecting the prize, but nothing about it dropping the prize.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen. It says a monster is protecting the prize, but nothing about it dropping the prize.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen. It says a monster is protecting the prize, but nothing about it dropping the prize.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That little girl with a gun seems to have bribed players into helping her, but I'll distract her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That little girl with a gun seems to have bribed players into helping her, but I'll distract her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That little girl with a gun seems to have bribed players into helping her, but I'll distract her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the meantime, you all should go look for the prize, got that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the meantime, you all should go look for the prize, got that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the meantime, you all should go look for the prize, got that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I'm surprised the simple-minded Naielle is now able to plan something like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I'm surprised the simple-minded Naielle is now able to plan something like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I'm surprised the simple-minded Naielle is now able to plan something like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Girls, look! There's a treasure chest here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Girls, look! There's a treasure chest here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Girls, look! There's a treasure chest here!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hehe, I'm sure the merchandise is inside
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hehe, I'm sure the merchandise is inside
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hehe, I'm sure the merchandise is inside
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Didn't Bora teach ya that any path that looks easy is a minefield?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Didn't Bora teach ya that any path that looks easy is a minefield?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Didn't Bora teach ya that any path that looks easy is a minefield?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, is that it? I can do this all day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, is that it? I can do this all day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, is that it? I can do this all day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-incredible. The Academy students are going head-to-head with the Blood Alliance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-incredible. The Academy students are going head-to-head with the Blood Alliance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-incredible. The Academy students are going head-to-head with the Blood Alliance!

records.m_SubTitle_ENG:
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Has the collaboration quest been put on the back burner?
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Show me the poster photo! It's blurred out in the channel!!
records.m_SubTitle_DEU:
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Has the collaboration quest been put on the back burner?
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Show me the poster photo! It's blurred out in the channel!!
records.m_SubTitle_FRA:
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Has the collaboration quest been put on the back burner?
<color=#ffd34c>hphphp</color> Show me the poster photo! It's blurred out in the channel!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...! Chat's getting riled up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...! Chat's getting riled up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...! Chat's getting riled up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-sorry for not talking! I'll do a penalty mission later!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-sorry for not talking! I'll do a penalty mission later!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-sorry for not talking! I'll do a penalty mission later!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, what a great battle. It reminds me of a battle by the beach I had a long time ago!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, what a great battle. It reminds me of a battle by the beach I had a long time ago!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, what a great battle. It reminds me of a battle by the beach I had a long time ago!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Something seems off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Something seems off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Something seems off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone should have found the poster by now, but it hasn't been found yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone should have found the poster by now, but it hasn't been found yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone should have found the poster by now, but it hasn't been found yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! I got swept up in the heat of battle and forgot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! I got swept up in the heat of battle and forgot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! I got swept up in the heat of battle and forgot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Where is it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Where is it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Where is it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't take it for yourselves, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't take it for yourselves, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't take it for yourselves, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came here from the countryside just to see Miya's poster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came here from the countryside just to see Miya's poster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came here from the countryside just to see Miya's poster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what?! Are you accusing us of stealing it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what?! Are you accusing us of stealing it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what?! Are you accusing us of stealing it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No internal conflicts! It will only bring down the reputation of the Blood Alliance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No internal conflicts! It will only bring down the reputation of the Blood Alliance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No internal conflicts! It will only bring down the reputation of the Blood Alliance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's as far as y'all go!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's as far as y'all go!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's as far as y'all go!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on? I can't see anything with all the smoke...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on? I can't see anything with all the smoke...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on? I can't see anything with all the smoke...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh...? What's happening?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh...? What's happening?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh...? What's happening?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The quest is over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The quest is over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The quest is over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While y'all were dillydallying, I took the treasure!
records.m_Talk_DEU: While y'all were dillydallying, I took the treasure!
records.m_Talk_FRA: While y'all were dillydallying, I took the treasure!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...W-who are you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...W-who are you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...W-who are you?!
